metadata.title: Turning a Tight Corner for a Quick Double in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how a sharp peek and steady aim catch both enemies off guard. Timing and positioning made this clutch moment possible.
Where do you prefer to hold angles when it’s 2v1?
Let me know your favorite spots!

Drop your best clutch moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
